GitHubApiData.name: BIRD-Interact
GitHubApiData.description: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: Re-imagines Text-to-SQL evaluation via lens of dynamic interactions.

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: [ICLR 2026 口头报告] BIRD-INTERACT：通过动态交互视角重新定义文本到SQL的评估。
TranslatedDescriptions.zh-TW: [ICLR 2026 口頭報告] BIRD-INTERACT：以動態互動的視角重新想像 Text-to-SQL 評估。
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: [ICLR 2026 구두 발표] BIRD-INTERACT: 동적 상호작용 관점에서 Text-to-SQL 평가를 재구성합니다.
TranslatedDescriptions.ja: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT：動的インタラクションの観点からText-to-SQL評価を再構築。
TranslatedDescriptions.th: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: นำเสนอการประเมิน Text-to-SQL ใหม่ผ่านมุมมองของการโต้ตอบแบบไดนามิก
TranslatedDescriptions.hi: [ICLR 2026 ओरल] BIRD-INTERACT: डायनामिक इंटरैक्शन के दृष्टिकोण से Text-to-SQL मूल्यांकन की पुनर्कल्पना करता है।
TranslatedDescriptions.en: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: Re-imagining Text-to-SQL evaluation through the lens of dynamic interactions.
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT : Réinvente l’évaluation Text-to-SQL à travers le prisme des interactions dynamiques.
TranslatedDescriptions.de: [ICLR 2026 Vortrag] BIRD-INTERACT: Neuinterpretation der Text-to-SQL-Evaluierung durch die Perspektive dynamischer Interaktionen.
TranslatedDescriptions.es: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: Reimagina la evaluación de Text-to-SQL a través de la lente de interacciones dinámicas.
TranslatedDescriptions.it: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: Re-immagina la valutazione Text-to-SQL attraverso la lente delle interazioni dinamiche.
TranslatedDescriptions.ru: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: Переосмысливает оценку Text-to-SQL через призму динамических взаимодействий.
TranslatedDescriptions.pt: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: Reimagina a avaliação de Text-to-SQL através da perspectiva de interações dinâmicas.
TranslatedDescriptions.nl: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: Herdefinieert Text-to-SQL-evaluatie door middel van dynamische interacties.
TranslatedDescriptions.ar: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: إعادة تصور تقييم تحويل النص إلى SQL من خلال منظور التفاعلات الديناميكية.
TranslatedDescriptions.pl: [ICLR 2026 Prezentacja ustna] BIRD-INTERACT: Nowe spojrzenie na ocenę Text-to-SQL przez pryzmat dynamicznych interakcji.
TranslatedDescriptions.fa: [ICLR 2026 ارائه شفاهی] BIRD-INTERACT: ارزیابی Text-to-SQL را از منظر تعاملات پویا بازتصور می‌کند.
TranslatedDescriptions.tr: [ICLR 2026 Sözlü] BIRD-INTERACT: Metinden-SQL'e değerlendirmeyi dinamik etkileşimler perspektifinden yeniden tasarlıyor.
TranslatedDescriptions.vi: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: Tái định hình đánh giá Text-to-SQL qua lăng kính tương tác động.
TranslatedDescriptions.id: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: Mengimajinasikan ulang evaluasi Text-to-SQL melalui perspektif interaksi dinamis.
TranslatedDescriptions.as: [ICLR 2026 Oral] BIRD-INTERACT: ডাইনামিক ইন্টাৰেকশ্যনৰ দৃষ্টিভংগীৰে Text-to-SQL মূল্যায়নক পুনৰ কল্পনা কৰে।
